---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the website, portal, or platform
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement, feature request
assignees: ''

---

## 📋 Prequisites

Take a couple minutes to help our maintainers work faster.

- [ ] I have [searched](https://github.com/netwk-pro/netwk-pro.github.io/issues?utf8=%E2%9C%93&q=is%3Aissue) for duplicate or closed issues
- [ ] I have read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/netwk-pro/netwk-pro.github.io/blob/master/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md)

## ✨ Feature Proposal

Provide detailed information for what we should add, including relevant links to prior art, screenshots, or live demos whenever possible.

## 📍 Where Will This Be Applied?

- [ ] Website
- [ ] Client Portal
- [ ] Legal Docs
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Other: `...`

## 🎯 Business or Security Goal

Tell us why this change is needed or helpful, and what problems it may help solve. Explain how this aligns with business or security goals.

## 🧩 Additional Notes

Add any mockups, diagrams, or references.
